leadText: Costar (Japanese: きょうえん Costarring) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature Ability of Flamigo.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Costar enters the battle, it copies an ally's stat stages for itself. This includes the ally's critical-hit ratio. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Costar has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Costar enters the battle, it copies an ally's stat stages for itself. This includes the ally's critical-hit ratio.
